name: FERRELLGAS PARTNERS L P
summary: Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. is a propane distribution company that sells propane and other gas liquids to residential, industrial/commercial, and agricultural customers (retail sales), as well as to portable tank exchange customers and bulk wholesale buyers (wholesale sales). The company also sells bulk propane to third-party distributors and refined fuel. It operates through its subsidiary Ferrellgas, L.P. as the operating partnership, with Ferrellgas, Inc. serving as general partner.

products.name: Retail Propane Sales
products.description: Propane sold to residential, industrial/commercial, and agricultural end users.

products.name: Wholesale Propane Sales
products.description: Propane sold to portable tank exchange customers and bulk wholesale buyers.

products.name: Other Gas Sales
products.description: Bulk propane sold to third-party distributors or marketers and refined fuel sales.
